footer.tagline: Free & anonymous vulnerability report validation — made by and for frustrated PSIRTlings.
home.heading: Vuln Report Rap Sheet
home.tagline: Assess the likelihood that an incoming vulnerability report describes a real, reproducible issue. Cross-check claims against live sources, detect duplicate submissions, and surface what deserves analyst time. Built by PSIRTlings for PSIRTlings™.
home.submitReportDescription: Upload a file, paste text, or link to a report (Max 5MB)
check.activeVerificationDesc: Live verification of referenced files, CVEs, and resources
